title: meconopsis elongata
intro: Meconopsis elongata, also known as the Himalayan blue poppy, is a species of flowering plant in the family Papaveraceae. This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, and its roots and rhizomes are valued for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Meconopsis elongata include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of various infections. The herbal preparations of this plant include root extracts, decoctions, and infusions, which can be used as a natural remedy for various ailments.
